full_content:
Implementation verification: GTKB-GOV-011 session self-initialization dashboard, startup disclosure, and proactive wrap-up engagement.

Owner authorization:
- Owner asked to proceed with GTKB-GOV-011.
- Owner added a guiding principle that the user should not have to explicitly instruct GT-KB to perform session wrap-up procedures, and sessions should actively inform and engage the user about project priorities while simplifying input through suggested actions.

Implementation artifacts:
- scripts/session_self_initialization.py generates the startup model, dashboard HTML, dashboard JSON, startup report, wrap-up report, and time-series dashboard history.
- docs/gtkb-dashboard/index.html is the live local dashboard link.
- docs/gtkb-dashboard/dashboard-data.json records the current dashboard model and time-series history.
- docs/gtkb-dashboard/session-startup-report.md records the latest startup disclosure.
- docs/gtkb-dashboard/session-wrapup-report.md records proactive wrap-up guidance.
- memory/gtkb-dashboard-history.json stores bounded time-series KPI snapshots.
- .claude/settings.json registers SessionStart and Stop lifecycle hooks.
- .codex/hooks.json registers corresponding Codex hook intent.
- scripts/check_codex_hook_parity.py verifies hook parity and the Windows-aware fallback contract.
- tests/scripts/test_session_self_initialization.py, tests/scripts/test_codex_hook_parity.py, tests/scripts/test_release_candidate_gate.py, and tests/scripts/test_groundtruth_governance_adoption.py verify implementation visibility and release-gate wiring.

Formal record updates:
- Add DELIB-0841 and lifecycle engagement records.
- Promote SPEC-PROJECT-DASHBOARD-KPI-LINK-001 to verified.
- Promote DCL-SESSION-STARTUP-TOKEN-BUDGET-001 to verified.
- Add DELIB-0842 implementation evidence and link it to the session lifecycle records.
- Mark GTKB-GOV-011 complete in the standing backlog.
explicit_change_request: Owner said: Please proceed with GTKB-GOV-011. Owner also added the proactive session wrap-up and priority engagement guiding principle.
change_reason: Verify GTKB-GOV-011 implementation and promote implemented session lifecycle records.
